# Python deps for the vendored tools this R skill shells out to.
# Install into any python3 you point the skill at (options("ctids.python") or PATH):
#   python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# ODM toolchain (odm/*.py):        lxml, duckdb, pandas
# NCI CDE search (odm/search_nci): duckdb
# find-protocol (find_protocol/):  duckdb, requests, pypdf
# render (render/):                stdlib only
lxml>=5.0
duckdb>=1.0
pandas>=2.0
pypdf>=4.0
requests>=2.31
